subject: Braixen
description: Braixen, the fox-like bipedal Fire-type Pokemon, is depicted mid-action in an outdoor grassy setting. Its yellow-and-cream fur is visible, and a flame burns from the twig held or protruding from its tail. The creature is in a dynamic posture, leaning forward with energy. The background shows a grassy ground with warm ambient tones. The art style is clean and bright in the XY-era Pokemon card tradition.
foreground: bipedal fox-like Pokemon with flame on tail-twig, mid-action pose
background: outdoor grassy setting with warm ambient light
